_comment: Source-of-truth fixture for FR-R01's role-coverage CI test. The 14 uj_* ids here mirror the wireframe ids in companygraph-journeys.html. The CI test (shared/__tests__/role-coverage.test.ts) asserts every entry appears in api/src/chat/roles/registry.ts OR in the documented exclusion list. NOT loaded by the seed importer — this is a wireframe-mirror fixture, separate from retail-mini.json's UUIDv7 graph data.
_source: companygraph-journeys.html v0.1 (2026-05-22) — uj_* ids extracted line-by-line
